Bash(curl -s 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ao-data/ao-bin-dumps/master/items.json' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = data.get\('items', {}\)
# Show all top-level keys
print\('Top-level keys in items:'\)
for key in items:
    val = items[key]
    if isinstance\(val, list\):
        print\(f'  {key}: list[{len\(val\)}]'\)
    elif isinstance\(val, dict\):
        print\(f'  {key}: dict'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  {key}: {type\(val\).__name__} = {str\(val\)[:60]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ao-data/ao-bin-dumps/master/items.json' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = data['items']

# Find a weapon with enchantments
for w in items['weapon']:
    if w.get\('@uniquename',''\).startswith\('T4_'\) and 'enchantments' in w:
        print\(json.dumps\(w, indent=2\)[:4000]\)
        break
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ao-data/ao-bin-dumps/master/items.json' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = data['items']

# Find a simpleitem that's a refined resource \(like planks, metalbar\)
for s in items['simpleitem']:
    if s.get\('@uniquename',''\) == 'T4_PLANKS':
        print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)[:2000]\)
        break

# Find an equipmentitem \(armor\)
for e in items['equipmentitem']:
    if e.get\('@uniquename',''\).startswith\('T4_'\) and 'craftingrequirements' in e:
        print\('---'\)
        print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in e.items\(\) if k in ['@uniquename','@tier','@shopcategory','@shopsubcategory1','@craftingcategory','craftingrequirements','enchantments','@shopsubcategory2']}, indent=2\)[:2000]\)
        break

# Find consumable \(potion/food\)
for c in items['consumableitem']:
    if c.get\('@uniquename',''\).startswith\('T4_'\) and 'craftingrequirements' in c:
        print\('---'\)
        print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in c.items\(\) if k in ['@uniquename','@tier','@shopcategory','@shopsubcategory1','@craftingcategory','craftingrequirements','@shopsubcategory2']}, indent=2\)[:1500]\)
        break
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ao-data/ao-bin-dumps/master/items.json' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = data['items']

craftable_count = 0
enchant_count = 0
categories = set\(\)

for key in ['simpleitem','consumableitem','equipmentitem','weapon','consumablefrominventoryitem','farmableitem','mount','furnitureitem','journalitem']:
    val = items.get\(key, []\)
    if isinstance\(val, dict\):
        val = [val]
    for item in val:
        if 'craftingrequirements' in item:
            craftable_count += 1
            cat = item.get\('@craftingcategory', item.get\('@shopcategory','unknown'\)\)
            categories.add\(cat\)
            # Count enchantment variants
            if 'enchantments' in item:
                ench = item['enchantments'].get\('enchantment', []\)
                if isinstance\(ench, dict\):
                    ench = [ench]
                enchant_count += len\(ench\)

print\(f'Total craftable base items: {craftable_count}'\)
print\(f'Total enchantment variants: {enchant_count}'\)
print\(f'Total items \(base + enchants\): {craftable_count + enchant_count}'\)
print\(f'Crafting categories: {sorted\(categories\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
